title: rubus × chenensis
intro: Rubus × chenensis, also known as Chinese raspberry or Chinese bramble, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × chenensis include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. Rubus × chenensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal benefits.
